'''matana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabelliite|sabelliite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabelliite|sabelliite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| matana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mætænæth|mætænæth]] || [[word:mætænæj|mætænæj]] || [[word:mætænæsh|mætænæsh]] || [[word:mætænæ|mætænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:matatanath|matatanath]] || [[word:matatanaj|matatanaj]] || [[word:matatanash|matatanash]] || [[word:matatana|matatana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:matanath|matanath]] || [[word:matanaj|matanaj]] || [[word:matanash|matanash]] || [[word:matana|matana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:matafnath|matafnath]] || [[word:matafnaj|matafnaj]] || [[word:matafnash|matafnash]] || [[word:matafnaf|matafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:matanatha|matanatha]] || [[word:matanaja|matanaja]] || [[word:matanasha|matanasha]] || [[word:matanaka|matanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:matanath|matanath]] || [[word:matanaj|matanaj]] || [[word:matanash|matanash]] || [[word:matana|matana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:matanathal|matanathal]] || [[word:matanajal|matanajal]] || [[word:matanashal|matanashal]] || [[word:matanakal|matanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:matanathatha|matanathatha]] || [[word:matanajaja|matanajaja]] || [[word:matanashasha|matanashasha]] || [[word:matanaka|matanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:matanathan|matanathan]] || [[word:matanajan|matanajan]] || [[word:matanashan|matanashan]] || [[word:matanakan|matanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:matanathaoro|matanathaoro]] || [[word:matanajaoro|matanajaoro]] || [[word:matanashaoro|matanashaoro]] || [[word:matanakaoro|matanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
